expected_subtasks.title: Run dependency vulnerability scan
expected_subtasks.description: Scan all dependencies for known CVEs

expected_subtasks.title: Review access controls and permissions
expected_subtasks.description: Audit user roles and API access

expected_subtasks.title: Review compliance requirements
expected_subtasks.description: Check SOC2 and GDPR compliance gaps

expected_subtasks.title: Document findings and remediation plan
expected_subtasks.description: Create audit report with prioritized fixes

what_good_breakdown_looks_like: 4-5 subtasks covering scanning, pen testing, access review, compliance, reporting.
acceptable_variation: May have 4-6 subtasks. Must include pen testing and compliance.
notes: Security audit task. Must include technical testing and compliance review.
